resources.string: Sign in to continue with your Google account.
Sign in below to keep your archive shelf, notes, and categories synced across devices.
Decluttr syncs app archive details to cloud: app link, icon snapshot, notes, tags, and categories. It does not upload APK files or in-app user data. Reinstalling opens the Play Store listing.
Your phone is packed.\nYour focus is not free.
Most phones carry dozens of apps that have not been opened in months. They still consume storage, request background work, and add distraction through clutter and notifications.
You do not want to delete it.\nYou just do not need it now.
After multiple searches and trials, you finally find a PDF merger that works. You use it rarely, but re-finding it later costs time. Decluttr keeps that memory for you.
Remove it from your phone.\nKeep it on your shelf.
Archive and uninstall apps in one clean flow. Your phone gets lighter now, while the app context stays available for future reinstall from Play Store.
Leave yourself a note.\nFuture you will know why.
This is the core difference from a normal bulk uninstaller. Add what an app is best at before you archive it, so later you are not guessing from a package name.
Example note: Best PDF merger I found. Handles scanned docs, no watermark on free tier. I only need it during tax season.
Decluttr finds what you have not touched in months.
Usage-based discovery surfaces rarely used apps so you can review in bulk, archive what is worth keeping, and uninstall what adds no value.
Your archive lives in the cloud.\nSafe. Always yours.
Switch phones and your archive shelf is still there: links, notes, and categories synced to your account.
Important: Decluttr stores archive context, not full app binaries or app-internal data. Any save data is handled by each app and its own backup system.
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Already have an account? Sign In
Email and password cannot be empty
Add a quick reminder for future you
No note yet. Add one to remember why you kept this app.
Notes are saved to your archive and synced when cloud sync is available.
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s from the archive?
Add context now, find it faster later
%1$d apps archived and ready for review
Quick notes improve future decisions when you revisit your archive.
Tip: add one short reason per app, like “Needed for travel” or “Work backup”.
Decluttr uses app usage access to identify rarely used apps and show cleanup recommendations. This data is processed on your device and is not required for basic archive features.
Use Discover to find rarely used and large apps, then archive before uninstalling so you can restore context later. Open Settings anytime for export, import, and appearance options.
Apps are archived after uninstalling to keep your context and notes.
Please login to view or archive apps.
No archived apps match your current search.
Try changing search or sort to discover more apps.
No high-impact cleanup targets right now
%1$d high-impact candidates identified from usage and size
%1$d high-impact candidates identified from app size
%1$d rarely used apps are ready to archive
Enable Usage Access to find archive-ready apps
Great set to archive now. Keep your phone clean and your app memory intact.
Good archive candidates here. Keep useful apps remembered without clutter.
Small archive wins now will keep clutter low later.
Archive little by little to stay organized.
Enable Usage Access to discover apps you can archive and still remember.
